name: nim-guard
notes: Node.js OpenAI-compatible HTTP proxy purpose-built for NVIDIA NIM free-tier rate limits. Two mechanisms: (1) Rate limiting — token-bucket limiter (queue-and-wait, never reject) enforces per-model RPM+TPM caps with 5% safety margin; model fallback chain on 429 with cooldown tracking. (2) Payload compression — pure string ops on message history before forwarding: collapseBlankLines, trimTrailingWhitespace, truncate messages >12k chars (head 4k + tail 4k + cut marker), dedupe back-to-back identical tool results (sig = tool_call_id+length+prefix). Always preserves last 2 messages untouched. CACHE-BREAKING: rewrites prior message content in-flight. Target: OpenCode (ships a ready-to-paste opencode.jsonc with 35 NIM models). No Claude Code support — NIM proxy only, no hooks, no MCP. Compression is minimal/generic (no format-aware compactors, no code/diff/log routing).
